basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Easing with the broader market: after the 22 June U.S.–Iran roadmap and the JMIC threat downgrade, the war-risk premium is still bleeding out of crude — Brent has eased to about $77 and physical NWE differentials are softening with it. This estimate now sits just above the futures benchmark rather than carrying a wide war premium. It is an editorial proxy, not a traded quote — treat as indicative, and watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
